commitMessage:
Swift 6 Native Builds (#3880)

### Goals :soccer:
This PR tracks the implementation of full concurrency checking when
building in Swift 6 mode. It's unknown whether all of these changes will
be fully backward compatible.

### Implementation Details :construction:
This PR largely consists of `Sendable` annotations, with a few logic
changes to fix actual safety issues.

### Testing Details :mag:
Tests updated with needed annotations, but mutation warnings need a
larger overall refactor.
entityNames:
(queue: DispatchQueue,
                                  handler: @Sendable (_ response: HTTPURLResponse,
                                                      _ completionHandler: @Sendable @escaping (ResponseDisposition) -> Void) -> Void)?

body.content:
let copiedRequest = request
        return session.dataTask(with: copiedRequest)

streamMutableState.write { state in
            state.outputStream?.close()
        }

        super.finish(error: error)

defer { resume() }

        var inputStream: InputStream?
        streamMutableState.write { state in
            Foundation.Stream.getBoundStreams(withBufferSize: bufferSize,
                                              inputStream: &inputStream,
                                              outputStream: &state.outputStream)
            state.outputStream?.open()
        }

        return inputStream

streamMutableState.write { mutableState in
            mutableState.httpResponseHandler = (queue, handler)
        }

        return self

onHTTPResponse(on: queue) { response, completionHandler in
            handler(response)
            completionHandler(.allow)
        }

        return self

responseStream(using: DecodableStreamSerializer<T>(decoder: decoder, dataPreprocessor: preprocessor),
                       on: queue,
                       stream: stream)
